title: Remote work policy
text: The engineering team operates remote-first. Employees may opt to come to the Tampa office on a flexible schedule. Mandatory in-office days are limited to quarterly planning weeks.

title: Hiring criteria
text: We hire engineers based on demonstrated production experience, not on credentials. A portfolio of shipped projects is weighted higher than degrees or certifications.

title: Compensation philosophy
text: Base salaries are benchmarked to the 75th percentile of comparable Tampa-area roles. Equity grants vest over four years with a one-year cliff.

title: Security review process
text: All third-party SaaS tools require a security review by the platform team before being added to the company stack. Reviews typically complete within five business days.

title: On-call rotation
text: The platform team runs a weekly on-call rotation. On-call engineers receive a stipend and are excused from non-urgent meetings during their week.
